zh.lifeSummary: 當John Dronsfield於大約1320年出生在英國越可爾韋斯特 布頓時，他的父親John Dronsfield20歲，母親Agnes Thornhill19歲。他於1362年與Joan Stainton在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1380年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年61歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dronsfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dransfield
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from Dronfield in Derbyshire, recorded in the Domesday Book as Dranefeld, from OE drān ‘drone’ + feld ‘open land’, or perhaps from Dransfield Hill in Mirfield, Yorkshire, although this name is more likely to derive from the surname than vice versa.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Dronsfield was born about 1320, in West Bretton, Yorkshire, England, his father, John Dronsfield, was 20 and his mother, Agnes Thornhill, was 19. He married Joan Stainton in 1362, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1380, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

Il a épousé Joan Stainton en 1362, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1380, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Dronsfieldが約1320年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウエスト ブレットオンで生まれた時，父John Dronsfieldは20歳，母Agnes Thornhillは19歳であった。1362年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでJoan Staintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1380年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Dronsfield(이)가 대략 1320년 영국 요르크실르 웨스트 브레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Dronsfield(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Thornhill(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1362년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Joan Stainton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1380년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Dronsfield родился около 1320 г. в местности вест бреттон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Dronsfield было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Thornhill, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Stainton в 1362 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1380 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.
